scripts.clean: rd /s /q .next .next-dev out 2>nul & del /f /q public\sw.js public\workbox-*.js 2>nul & exit 0
scripts.android: npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.android:apk: cd android && JAVA_HOME='/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home' bash ./gradlew assembleDebug
scripts.android:apk:release: cd android && JAVA_HOME='/Applications/Android Studio.app/Contents/jbr/Contents/Home' bash ./gradlew assembleRelease
scripts.android:dev: CAP_SERVER_URL=http://localhost:3001 npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
scripts.android:dev:host: CAP_SERVER_URL=http://10.0.2.2:3001 npx cap sync android && npx cap open android
